diagrams.name: service_provider_boot_and_register
diagrams.title: AI Service Provider Boot & Registration
diagrams.description: How AiServiceProvider registers bindings, publishes assets, and boots the Laravel AI package
diagrams.scope: Package bootstrap and IoC container registration

diagrams.name: anonymous_agent_text_generation
diagrams.title: Anonymous Agent Text Generation Flow
diagrams.description: Client creates an anonymous agent via helper, calls prompt(), which resolves a text provider and returns a response

diagrams.name: agent_tool_call_loop
diagrams.title: Agent Tool Call Loop
diagrams.description: Agent receives a tool-call response from the provider, executes the tool, appends the result, and re-prompts until a final text response is returned
diagrams.scope: Multi-turn tool execution within a single agent prompt

diagrams.name: structured_agent_response
diagrams.title: Structured Agent Response with Schema
diagrams.description: Client uses StructuredAnonymousAgent with a JSON schema; the provider returns a structured output validated against the schema

diagrams.name: queued_agent_prompt
diagrams.title: Queued Agent Prompt Dispatch
diagrams.description: Agent prompt is dispatched to a queue via QueuedAgentPrompt; FakePendingDispatch intercepts in tests
diagrams.scope: Asynchronous agent prompt via Laravel queue

diagrams.name: model_failover_flow
diagrams.title: Model Failover Flow
diagrams.description: Promptable attempts primary provider/model, catches failure, and retries with fallback providers using withModelFailover

diagrams.name: streaming_and_broadcast
diagrams.title: Streaming & Broadcast Response
diagrams.description: Client calls stream() or broadcast() on an agent; response chunks are pushed via Laravel Broadcasting or returned as a stream
diagrams.scope: Real-time streaming and broadcasting of AI responses

diagrams.name: remember_conversation_middleware
diagrams.title: Remember Conversation Middleware
diagrams.description: RememberConversation middleware intercepts an agent prompt, persists messages and auto-generated title to storage, then passes through

diagrams.name: image_generation_flow
diagrams.title: Image Generation Flow
diagrams.description: Client calls Image::of(), configures size/quality via PendingImageGeneration, then calls generate() or queue() against the image provider

diagrams.name: audio_generation_flow
diagrams.title: Audio Generation (TTS) Flow
diagrams.description: Client calls Audio::of(), sets voice/instructions via PendingAudioGeneration, then calls generate() or queue() against the audio provider

diagrams.name: transcription_flow
diagrams.title: Audio Transcription Flow
diagrams.description: Client calls Transcription::of()/fromPath()/fromStorage(), configures language/diarization via PendingTranscriptionGeneration, then calls generate() or queue()

diagrams.name: embeddings_generation_and_caching
diagrams.title: Embeddings Generation & Caching Flow
diagrams.description: Client calls Embeddings::for(), PendingEmbeddingsGeneration checks cache, generates vectors if cache miss, stores result, returns embeddings
diagrams.scope: Embedding vector generation with optional caching

diagrams.name: reranking_flow
diagrams.title: Reranking Flow
diagrams.description: Client calls Reranking::of(), configures limit via PendingReranking, then calls rerank() against the reranking provider

diagrams.name: vector_store_management
diagrams.title: Vector Store Management Flow
diagrams.description: Client uses Stores facade to create/delete vector stores; Store instance manages document add/remove/refresh operations
diagrams.scope: Vector store CRUD and document management

diagrams.name: similarity_search_tool
diagrams.title: Similarity Search Tool Execution
diagrams.description: SimilaritySearch tool generates query embeddings, performs vector similarity lookup in a store, optionally reranks results, and returns them to the agent
diagrams.scope: RAG similarity search with optional reranking

diagrams.name: file_management_flow
diagrams.title: File Management Flow
diagrams.description: Client uses Files facade to upload, retrieve, or delete files (e.g. for assistants/batches) via the AI provider file API
diagrams.scope: AI provider file upload and retrieval
